---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability, doc, or refinement.
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What are you trying to do

The user-visible outcome, described in one paragraph. If you can, frame
it as a job-to-be-done: "when I <situation>, I want to <do X>, so that <Y>."

## Why can't you do it today

The current friction. Workarounds you've tried.

## Proposed shape

A sketch of what the API / CLI / doc / chart would look like. Concrete
> beats abstract — a hypothetical command output, a values.yaml
snippet, a mocked-up response body.

```bash
# example: proposed command
plnt bench compare llama-3-70b --runtimes vllm,sglang --qps 10
```

## Non-goals for this feature

What you are NOT asking for. Prevents scope creep.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed and why this one wins.

## Related

Links to any existing issues, PRs, discussions, or upstream references.
